strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with ~20 years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Demonstrates builder fluency and entrepreneurial mindset through GISCollective founding and multiple open-source projects with technical depth
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP, agentic workflows), showing emerging AI platform involvement
concerns: Resume does not demonstrate recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products—the role requires 'demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
Lacks Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field, which is a stated preference for this director-level role
Career positioning is solid mid-to-senior (Staff Engineer) but does not explicitly position candidate as Principal or Director-level IC

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of software engineering experience

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has solid foundational credentials—20 years of software engineering and proven builder fluency across multiple domains and languages—but is significantly misaligned on the primary differentiator for this role. The position explicitly seeks 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'; his resume shows only recent involvement with AI infrastructure tooling at re:cinq, not the deep AI/ML domain expertise or shipped AI products expected of a principal-level strategist. He also lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field. While his entrepreneurial track record and technical depth are assets, the AI expertise gap and lack of advanced degree make him unsuitable for this particular strategic AI role.
